rationale.R1.2: The agent provides a detailed analysis of logical consistency issues in the abstract and proposes concrete edits to improve it.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly discloses its uncertainty about several claims and suggests specific edits, indicating high confidence in its assessment.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers all aspects of the abstract comprehensively without drifting from the scope requested.
rationale.RX.4: The agent does not introduce any new errors or harmful content; it only provides critical feedback on existing issues.
rationale.RX.5: The agent traces its analysis and suggestions to specific parts of the abstract, providing clear rationale.
